prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约5910名、5489名、16163名、5625名、6969名。2023年出现异常断档（16163名），2024年迅速恢复至5625名，2025年又后移 至6969名，近两年呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约6969名；该校在青海省2021–2025年各科类招生计划均为40人，2026年物理类计划仍为40人，招生 规模连续6年持平，无扩招或缩招信号，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；2026年软科中国大学主榜排名约第134名，近年排名 在130–140名区间波动，整体稳定；2023年声誉评价偏正面（食堂服务好、投诉处理及时）；2022年中性/混合（投档线逐年下降趋势）。 抖音综合热度排名第86位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显热度升温信号。历史投档异常方面，2022年曾因投档线逐年下降被标注为"中关注"，但20 23年后未再出现明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，畜牧学获评A、作物学获评A-，均为农林类核心优势学科，与该校招生专业（农学、动物科学、植物保护等 ）高度对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校农林类相关专业社会热度整体平稳；青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人（数据标注"不确定"）， 按历史理科/物理类占比约63%–65%估算，2026年物理类考生约30720人，较2025年物理类30457人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生总数略有增加等因素，在2025年基准6969名基础上预计竞争小幅加剧，预测最低位次约7049名，区间6549–7549名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 5910, 5489, 16163, 5625, and 6969 respectively. An abnormal gap occurred in 2023 (16163), quickly recovered to 5625 in 2024, and then shifted back to 6969 in 2025, showing a fluctuating backward trend in recent two years, with a baseline of about 6969 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for all subject categories in Qinghai Province from 2021 to 2025 was 40 students each year, and the 2026 physics category plan remains 40 students, with enrollment scale stable for six consecutive years, no expansion or contraction signals, neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in 2026, it ranks approximately 134th in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Main Ranking, fluctuating within the 130–140 range in recent years, overall stable; reputation evaluation in 2023 was relatively positive (good cafeteria service, timely complaint handling); in 2022, it was neutral/mixed (declining admission score line trend). Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 86th, rated as 'average', short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, no obvious popularity warming signal. In terms of historical admission anomalies, it was marked as 'medium attention' in 2022 due to declining admission score lines, but no significant gap records appeared after 2023; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Animal Science was rated A, Crop Science was rated A-, both core advantageous disciplines in agriculture and forestry, highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors (Agronomy, Animal Science, Plant Protection, etc.), attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of the university's agriculture and forestry related majors is stable; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (data marked 'uncertain'), estimated based on historical science/physics category proportion of about 63%–65%, the 2026 physics category candidates are about 30,720, slightly increased from 30,457 in 2025, competition slightly intensifies.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and a slight increase in the number of candidates in the province, based on the 2025 baseline of 6969, competition is expected to slightly intensify, predicting a minimum ranking of about 7049, with a range of 6549–7549.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6549–7549, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Agronomy, Animal Science, and other advantageous discipline majors) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Financial Management, Law, Economics) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Agricultural Resources and Environment, Bioengineering, Engineering Cost, etc.) as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 6549), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors.
